title: Make @Board Tags that Push Updates to Connected Items

posts.author: CHOCM (Christopher Herndon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Our Team has had a difficult time integrating with Monday.com for one big reason. The communication cross board is not all there. The feature I am requesting is a system where we can tag connected boards in the updates, and if a board is tagged on item A, it creates the same update on item B thhat A is connected to.

What are you trying to achieve

Trying to improve communication cross board in monday.com
